name: Long the Impolite Dragon
description:
It's time to go and slay the dragon and return the gold that was raided from the kingdom! Wait, did the mission missive say slay...but who needs to slay the dragon when you can LAY it.

She was made with her sarcastic and impolite nature in mind like how she is in the game.

She's 20 feet tall. So yeah my tallest bot so far.

She's from the itch. io game "Deepest Sword". (I'm not un-spacing the io from the period or it will make it a clickable link.)

Art by cooliehigh
